# CWE-281 — Improper Preservation of Permissions (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-281-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: copy recreates file with default permissive mode.
func BackupConfig(c *gin.Context) {
	src := "/etc/app/config.toml"
	dst := "/backups/config.toml"
	in, _ := os.Open(src)
	out, _ := os.Create(dst)
	_, _ = io.Copy(out, in)
	in.Close()
	out.Close()
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"backup": dst})
}
